query: SELECT `id`, `userId`, `name`, `agentIds`, `frequency`, `enabled`, `lastRunAt`, `nextRunAt`, `retentionCount`, `lastError`, `successCount`, `failureCount`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `baseline_schedules` WHERE `enabled` = true AND `nextRunAt` <= NOW() LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xenzgJ3NGNThF2.96bc46f6ec2f --database 9n2ukZGVgWAjZMdS2ZS3BU --execute SELECT `id`, `userId`, `name`, `agentIds`, `frequency`, `enabled`, `lastRunAt`, `nextRunAt`, `retentionCount`, `lastError`, `successCount`, `failureCount`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `baseline_schedules` WHERE `enabled` = true AND `nextRunAt` <= NOW() LIMIT 10;
